ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato for Petitioner.

The Court noted that a petition for final distribution has not been filed. Mr. Kato stated that closing this estate is contingent upon closing the pre-deceased Daughter's estate in Massachusetts and that closing of the Daughter's estate has not been approved. The Court stated that there should have been a petition for approval of a report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to January 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Kato is to have a petition on file by January 7, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato for James O'Donnell, Jr. (Executor).

Mr. Kato stated that the inventory and appraisal was submitted to the Probate Referee, that the Decedent's Daughter's estate for final distribution has been docketed, but he does not have the date and that sale of the lot in Pennsylvania is in contract and expected to close this week. Status on close of estate is continued to December 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brent Kato for James O'Donnell (Executor).

The Court expressed concern about the inventory and appraisal as it stands and stated that it needs to show valuation of the interest in the Daughter's estate. Mr. Kato stated that he requested the inventory from the Daughter's probate and that he will provide it to the Probate Referee. The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on close of estate is set for October 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Mr. Kato that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has to be filed by then. The Court also stated that it expects that the inventory and appraisal issue be resolved by then.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
